steps.title: Match the time frame
steps.content: The passage describes events in the 1950s. The previous sentence uses the simple past verb "advised" for Zufall's action, and the blank describes another action in the same past sequence.

steps.title: Choose simple past
steps.content: B is present tense, C is past perfect, and D is past progressive. Those forms either leave the past frame or add an unsupported time relationship. The simple past form keeps the action parallel with "advised." The answer is A.
